title: Jersey Association of Disability Examiners (JADE) — Constitution
description: Governing constitution of the Jersey Association of Disability Examiners (JADE), the New Jersey chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE). Includes a preamble and covers chapter name, purpose, composition/eligibility (persons involved in the New Jersey disability benefits program), membership, the Executive Board and officers (President, Vice President, Secretary, Treasurer, Member-at-Large), duties of officers and the board, meetings (monthly), standing committees (Awards, Constitution and By-Laws, Professional Relations, Program), parliamentary authority, and amendments.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — New Jersey Chapter (JADE)
source.title: Constitution of the Jersey Association of Disability Examiners (JADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'NEW-JERSEY-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived and the source contains OCR-style artifacts (e.g. 'ASSOCIATTON', 'COMMITTFES', 'keen a record') preserved as-converted. The file is the chapter Constitution (by-laws are referenced via the Constitution & By-Laws committee but not separately reproduced). NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
